Package component.modifier.changer

Class Changer<T>

java.lang.Object
component.modifier.Modifier
component.modifier.changer.Changer<T>
All Implemented Interfaces:
Tippable, GridIndexable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Arithmetic, Setter
public abstract class Changer<T> extends Modifier
The Changer class is a generic base for modifiers that alter a specific property of a Card.

It handles the core lifecycle of a modification, including material-specific interactions (Glass breakage, Rubber double-triggering, and Corrupted disabling). * @param The type of the property being changed (e.g., Integer for values, Suit for card suits).

    Defines the categories of card properties that can be modified.

  • Method Details

    • getChange

      public T getChange()
      Returns:
      The value/state this modifier intends to apply.

    • setChange

      public void setChange(T changeValue)
      Parameters:
      changeValue - The value/state to be assigned to this modifier.

    • getChangeType

      public Changer.ChangeType getChangeType()
      Returns:
      The category of change this class performs.

    • change

      public abstract void change(Card toModify)
      Performs the specific logic of the modification.

      Subclasses (like Adder or SuitSetter) must implement this to define exactly how the card's internal state is updated.

      Parameters:
      toModify - The card to be altered.

    • isBlocking

      public boolean isBlocking()
      Returns the blocking status of the modifier tile.
      Returns:
      Always false, as cards must be able to enter the tile to be modified.

    • modify

      public void modify(Card toModify)
      The primary entry point for a card entering a modification tile.

      The logic follows a strict priority:

      1. Disable Check: If the card is Material.CORRUPTED, it may disable this modifier.
      2. Glass Check: If the card is Material.GLASS, its health is reduced; if it hits 0, it shatters and logic stops.
      3. Rubber Check: If the card is Material.RUBBER, the change(Card) method is called twice.
      4. Standard Execution: The change(Card) method is called.
      Specified by:
      modify in class Modifier
      Parameters:
      toModify - The card passing through the tile.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the modifier to its default state, specifically re-enabling it.
      Specified by:
      reset in class Modifier

    • getTooltip

      public Tooltip getTooltip()
      Description copied from class: Modifier
      Returns the primary tooltip explaining the modifier's function.
      Specified by:
      getTooltip in interface Tippable
      Overrides:
      getTooltip in class Modifier
      Returns:
      A specialized tooltip describing the Changer's role.

    • getChangerTooltip

      public static Tooltip getChangerTooltip()
      Static helper to provide a consistent tooltip for the abstract Changer class.
      Returns:
      A Tooltip explaining that this component changes card properties.
